items.name_en: Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Arrival pinacoteca features ultra-soft leather, weaving functionality, practicality, and a relaxed chic vibe❤️‍🔥 Highly recommended for daily essentials. The size perfectly meets the commuting needs of city women—smartphone, keys, lipstick, compact powder, sunscreen, shopping bags... it fits it all!!!🔥 The capacity is impressive~ Suitable for everyone, any outfit, and any occasion. The elegant curved silhouette, exquisite woven texture, refined stitching, and rounded handles make this woven basket bag truly 'stylish yet practical, chic yet effortless'~ Any fashion lovers interested?

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Men's ANDIAMO Shoulder Bag. The undisputed star of Bottega Veneta is the Andiamo. The first new favorite of 2025 is this exclusive men's bag with a unique buckle. The designer has clearly incorporated many clever details. The detachable shoulder strap is very convenient for office elites to carry work logs and office supplies, reducing the burden in their hands. The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.

The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.
Style No.: 805969
Dimensions: 43*32*20cm

specs.rawTitle:
BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Men's ANDIAMO Shoulder Bag. The undisputed star of Bottega Veneta is the Andiamo. The first new favorite of 2025 is this exclusive men's bag with a unique buckle. The designer has clearly incorporated many clever details. The detachable shoulder strap is very convenient for office elites to carry work logs and office supplies, reducing the burden in their hands. The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.
Style No.: 805969
Dimensions: 43*32*20cm
